meaning: n.鐑熺伀,鐑熺伀瑁呯疆(鏉愭枡)
examples: A number of vertical line sources was generally caused by catalytic agents, dispersed from falling pyrotechnical flares of an airplane or a rocket.
The influence of the oxygen balance of pyrotechnical combustion agent and the structure of its rare earth metal shell on the burning performance of the combined combustion element were studied.
However, these pyrotechnical feats came at a price.
